prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PLC-550-SHOELACE-BROWN-45IN-NCX Product Type: SHOELACE Brand (from catalog): ParaLace Existing Title: ParaLace 550 Paracord Shoelaces for Hiking Boots Running Shoes, Brown 45 Inch Description: ParaLace brand 550 paracord hiking boot laces are built for adventure, made to be used and designed to withstand even the most rugged of outdoor environments. Already packed on your person, these paracord shoe laces are a valuable piece of survival gear ready for action, as you take to the great outdoors.

While these shoe laces for hiking boots conquer the obvious, helping support you and maintain your footwear, they cross over as reliable emergency preparedness items or survival tools: use them to assist with injuries, build snare or guy lines, unravel for fishing line or sewing thread, create a sling, repair or maintain camping gear in the field, hang a hammock and more; the scope and versatility of these 550 paracord round shoe laces are boundless.

ParaLace wilderness survival hiking boot laces are the shoe laces you’ll want to reach down for, work or play. With a 550lbs static load strength, our shoe laces are incredibly durable, strong and will outperform regular stock shoe laces. Their incredible static tensile strength means that these laces can handle a lot of wear and tear, abrasion and recurrent exposure to harsh conditions, simply based on their robust design. These unisex shoe laces feature low nylon stretch fabrication, ensuring shoe lace knots hold in place, resulting in fewer adjustments and more comfortable movement.

ParaLace outdoor shoe laces are of kernmantle design. Fabricated from 9 removable inner nylon strands (kern), each made of up 3 nylon yarns, enclosed by an exterior woven nylon sheath (mantle) and capped off by 4mm black metal aglets. Our metal aglets help to prevent frayed ends, while their diameter makes them work well with casual shoes, running shoes, hiking or work boots.

Extreme backcountry wilderness adventurer, family camping trip or weekend warrior trail seeker, these 550 paracord shoe laces are an easy addition to include with outdoor gear that won’t weigh you down. Search Terms: (none) Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 550 Lb Static Load, Survival Gear, Kernmantle Design, Metal Aglets, Low Nylon Stretch, Hiking Boots And Running Shoes

openai.title_differentiation: 550Lb Strength, Low Stretch, Metal Aglets, Kernmantle Nylon, Abrasion Resistant, Hiking Boot Ready
